title: Random Item Skyblock
description: Spawn in the void on a single block of bedrock where you and your friends are given a completely random item every minute with the ultimate goal of defeating the Ender Dragon and beating the void!
body:
Spawn in the void on a single block of bedrock where you and your friends are given a completely random item every minute with the ultimate goal of defeating the Ender Dragon and beating the void!

This is a vanilla+ pack which does not add any new blocks/items. The mods in this pack are purely performance, visual effects, or to support the random item game.

To modify the game use **/RandomItemsSetup** to configure the time interval between getting items and how many items each player will receive. The default value is 1 item every 30 seconds.

Use **/RandomItemsStart** to begin generating random items for players. Once this command is used the setup command will no longer be usable.
